quirks.name: Animalistic Appearance
quirks.description: Given to bipedal Meks and ProtoMeks whose appearance resembles that of an animal (ie Kodiak and Mandrill) (CO pg 72)

quirks.name: Anti-Aircraft Targeting
quirks.description: -2 to hit airborne units who are not grounded.

quirks.name: Atmospheric Flyer
quirks.description: This unit is easy to handle in atmosphere. -1 to all control rolls in atmo.

quirks.name: Barrel Fists (LA)
quirks.description: An arm with this quirk does not apply the +1 modifier for a missing hand. Must be applied to one or both arms.

quirks.name: Barrel Fists (RA)
quirks.description: An arm with this quirk does not apply the +1 modifier for a missing hand. Must be applied to one or both arms.

quirks.name: Battle Computer
quirks.description: +2 to initiative while mech is active and pilot/crew is awake. Does not stack w/ any other initiative bonuses.

quirks.name: Battle Fists (LA)
quirks.description: -1 to-hit when making punches with hands.

quirks.name: Battle Fists (RA)
quirks.description: -1 to-hit when making punches with hands.

quirks.name: Combat Computer
quirks.description: The combat computer reduces heat generated by up to four points per turn, but not less than zero.

quirks.name: Command Mech
quirks.description: +1 to initiative. Does not stack any other initiative bonuses

quirks.name: Compact Mech
quirks.description: Allows a mech to share a cubicle/recovery slot with another Compact Mech.

quirks.name: Cowl
quirks.description: 3 extra points of head armor except from attacks in the row of hexes directly in front of the Mek.

quirks.name: Directional Torso Mount
quirks.description: Select the location (s) (head or torso) holding a directional mount. Weapons in those locations can be set to the forward or rear arc; the arc persists between turns. When the location is hit roll 2D6, on 9+ the mount is destroyed and locked in its current arc.

quirks.name: Directional Torso Mount (360)
quirks.description: Quad 'Mechs only. Select the location (s) (head or torso) whose weapons operate as a full 360-degree turret. When the location is hit roll 2D6, on 9+ the mount is destroyed and locked in its current arc.

quirks.name: Distracting
quirks.description: Imposes +1 on opponents Moral checks. More effects with Demoralizer pilot ability.

quirks.name: Docking Arms
quirks.description: Assists with Dropship and Small craft docking -1 piloting TN.

quirks.name: Easy to Maintain
quirks.description: Repair and replacement rolls made with -1 TN. Implemented in MekHQ,

quirks.name: Easy to Pilot
quirks.description: This unit is easier to pilot. Mek Warrior with a piloting greater than 3 get a -1 TN to piloting checks made due to damage or terrain.

quirks.name: Extended Torso Twist
quirks.description: The unit can torso twist 2 hexsides. Quads with this are able to do a normal torso twist.

quirks.name: Fast Reload
quirks.description: Mek reloads ammunition magazines in half the time.

quirks.name: Fine Manipulators
quirks.description: Mek is capable of delicate work, See TM Pg 245.

quirks.name: Good Reputation (1)
quirks.description: Unit costs 10% more C-bills

quirks.name: Good Reputation (2)
quirks.description: Unit costs 20% more C-bills

quirks.name: Hyper-Extending Actuators
quirks.description: This unit can flip arms, even with lower arm and hand actuators.

quirks.name: Improved Communications
quirks.description: Unit has a powerful Com system. Auomatically ignores first level of Ghost Targets (p100, TO:AR) and can always attempt Battlemech Sat Uplink (p162, TO:AR) without giving up movement or combat actions.

quirks.name: Improved Life Support
quirks.description: harder to damage Mekwarrior from heat when life support damaged. Treat heat as 5 less when determining damage to a MekWarrior caused by heat.

quirks.name: Improved Targeting (Long)
quirks.description: -1 to ranged attacks at long range.

quirks.name: Improved Targeting (Medium)
quirks.description: -1 to ranged attacks at medium range.

quirks.name: Improved Targeting (Short)
quirks.description: -1 to ranged attacks at short range.

quirks.name: Improved Sensors
quirks.description: Acts as an active probe or extends range of existing active probe by 2.

quirks.name: Internal Bomb Bay
quirks.description: Allows some units to utilize cargo space as bomb bays, and can drop 6 bombs a turn. When dropping bombs, and receiving fire from the ground, roll 2d6. On 10+ all remaining bombs detonate and deal damage directly to units SI.

quirks.name: Narrow/Low Profile
quirks.description: This unit may take less damage because of a narrow/low profile. If margin of success on an attack is 0 or 1, the hit is a glancing blow. Glancing blows inflict 1/2 damage, for weapons on the cluster hit table apply -4 modifier, min result of 2. Apply -2 modifier when determining crit hits on glancing blows. -4 when using Advanced Determining Critical Hits rule

quirks.name: Multi-Trac
quirks.description: No secondary target modifiers in front and arm arcs.

quirks.name: Nimble Jumper
quirks.description: The unit is especially nimble when jumping. The jumping mech can deviate its jump line by one hex, allowing it to cover +1 hex due to the deviation. 1 additional heat generated when jumping this way. Increase jumping TMM to +2, and attacker modifier to +4.

quirks.name: Overhead Arms
quirks.description: Arm weapons are treated as one level higher for purposes of cover, but not LOS. +2 TN on punch and arm mounted melee weapons.

quirks.name: Power Reverse
quirks.description: Unit can use full Flank MP in reverse, +1 to piloting TN while doing so. All other movement and turning rules apply.

quirks.name: Protected Actuators
quirks.description: Infantry leg and swarm attacks are harder against this unit. Infantry and BattleArmor Swarm attacks get a +1 TN.

quirks.name: Reinforced Legs
quirks.description: Half damage to attacker on successful DFA.

quirks.name: Rugged (1 Point)
quirks.description: Mek is extremely reliable and doesn't need as much maintenance. It can go twice as long between maintenance checks.

quirks.name: Rugged (2 Point)
quirks.description: Mek is extremely reliable and doesn't need as much maintenance. It can go three times as long between maintenance checks.

quirks.name: Rumble Seat (Legacy)
quirks.description: Allows the Mek/vee to carry an extra passenger.

quirks.name: Scout Bike
quirks.description: Vees may enter light woods hexes.

quirks.name: Searchlight
quirks.description: Unit has a searchlight. On a torso hit roll 2d6, on a 7+ the searchlight is destroyed in addition to normal damage.

quirks.name: Stable
quirks.description: This unit is more stable against physical attacks. -1 to piloting TN due to physical attack.

quirks.name: Trailer Hitch
quirks.description: Vee with this quirk can tow other units with this quirk using Tractor rules, see TW pg 205.

quirks.name: Ubiquitous (Inner Sphere)
quirks.description: The unit is so common in the IS that parts are easily available. -2 TN to locate replacement parts.

quirks.name: Ubiquitous (Clans)
quirks.description: The unit is so common in the Clans that parts are easily available. -2 TN to locate replacement parts.

quirks.name: Variable Range Targeting
quirks.description: Player selects Long or Short mode during End Phase. LONG: -1 long range, +1 short. SHORT: -1 short range, +1 long. Medium unaffected. Cannot combine with Improved Targeting.

quirks.name: Vestigial Hands (Left)
quirks.description: Mek equipped with left hand capable of simple actions, but no hand crit slots.

quirks.name: Vestigial Hands (Right)
quirks.description: Mek equipped with right hand capable of simple actions, but no hand crit slots.

quirks.name: VTOL Rotor Arrangement (Co-Axial)
quirks.description: +2 modifier for VTOLS isn't applied on the Failed Maneuver Table, but a critical hit to the rotor adds an adition +1 TN.

quirks.name: VTOL Rotor Arrangement (Dual Rotors)
quirks.description: Can not sideslip or bootlegger maneuvers, all VTOL turn modes increased by 1. Applys -1 to all piloting TNs.

quirks.name: Atmospheric Flight Instability
quirks.description: This unit is hard to handle in atmosphere. All control rolls in atmo receive a +1 TN.

quirks.name: Bad Reputation (Inner Sphere)
quirks.description: Unit has a bad reputation among IS factions. Only worth 50% resale value.

quirks.name: Bad Reputation (Clan)
quirks.description: Clans consider the unit Dezgra. If using Clan Honor rules begin battle with 1 Dezgra point.

quirks.name: Cramped Cockpit
quirks.description: +1 to piloting rolls.

quirks.name: Difficult Ejection
quirks.description: The pilot will take additional damage on a failed ejection. If pilot fails a Piloting roll when ejecting, take 1 extra point of damage.

quirks.name: Difficult to Maintain
quirks.description: All repair/replacement rolls are made with a +1 TN.

quirks.name: EM Interference (Whole Unit)
quirks.description: Firing any energy weapon causes Electromagnetic Interference against the unit for 1 turn stopping the following gear from functioning: any ECM, any Active Probe, Artemis IV FCS, Artemis V FCS, Blue Shield PFD, any C3, Chameleon LPS, Cockpit Command Console, Electronic Warfare Equipment, MASC, MRM FCS, Narc (and iNarc), Null Signature System, Stealth Armor, Streak Launchers, Supercharger, Targeting Computer, and Void Signature System.

quirks.name: Exposed Actuators
quirks.description: Infantry leg and swarm attacks are easier against this unit. Those attacks are made at a -1 TN.

quirks.name: Flawed Cooling System
quirks.description: Unit will generate +5 heat each turn for the remainder of the battle on a roll of 10+ any time it receives a physical attack, falls or takes 20+ damage. Can only occure once per battle.

quirks.name: Fragile Fuel Tank
quirks.description: The fuel tank on this unit is more likely to explode. On a critical fueltank hit roll 2d6 on 8+ the tank explodes. Any critical hit also results in a fuel tank critical effect on a 10+ result of 2d6.

quirks.name: Gas Hog
quirks.description: Unit uses double fuel when moving faster than Cruising/Safe Thrust speed.

quirks.name: Hard to Pilot
quirks.description: This unit is hard to pilot. +1 TN to all piloting/driving rolls.

quirks.name: Illegal Design
quirks.description: Roll 2d6 every 6 turns, on 6+ the unit suffers a catastrophic failure in 1d6 locations using front hit table. Roll the critical hits check on each location with a +4. On a roll of 13+ on any location but Torso it collapses, and destoys all items, ammo explodes as normal. Torso locations rolled suffer 4 critical hits instead. UNits with this quirk have an additional +4 TN to repair or replace any damaged or destroyed parts. Double all repair and maint times. If a repair failes the item gains Non-functional.

quirks.name: Large Dropship
quirks.description: Dropship takes 2 docking collars, instead of 1.

quirks.name: Low-Mounted Arms
quirks.description: Arms are mounted lower, and are blocked by level 1 terrain/depth like leg mounted weapons. Hits on low mounted arms blocked by level 1 cover. Weapons mounted in the arms can not be fired while the Mek is prone.

quirks.name: No Ejection System
quirks.description: What about the title don't you understand?

quirks.name: No Torso Twist (Legacy)
quirks.description: The title says it all really.

quirks.name: Non-Standard Parts
quirks.description: When attempting to locate replacement parts, add +2 to TN.

quirks.name: Obsolete
quirks.description: +1 TN to locate replacement parts for every 15 years after Obsolete date. For every 20 years after the Obsolete date, reduce the resale cost (But not purchase cost) by 10 percent (Maximum of 50%)

quirks.name: Oversized
quirks.description: Meks passing through buildings suffer a +1 TN to avoid damage. Oversized Meks do not recieve the +1 TN from partial cover when being attacked.

quirks.name: Poor Life Support
quirks.description: Easier to damage Mekwarrior from heat when life support damaged. Treat heat as 5 higher when determining damage to a Mekwarrior after a life support critical hit. Reduces the cockpits life support time from four days to two.

quirks.name: Poor Performance
quirks.description: Cannot accelerate immediately to Running/Flanking speed. Must spend one turn expending Mp equal to walking/cruiseing/safe thrust before it can use Mp to run/flank/maximum thrust the following turn.

quirks.name: Poor Sealing
quirks.description: Unit is more likely to suffer a breach and must test for a breach any time a hostile environment is entered. +2 TN to making a Hull Breach Check. First time entering water/hostile enviroment make a hull breach check. Failure results a flood to a random location determined by Front Location Table. If a Mek would otherwise be immuune to hull breaches, consider it to have a base hull breach TN of 12 before the +2 TN modifier.

quirks.name: Poor Targeting (Long)
quirks.description: +1 to ranged attacks at long range.

quirks.name: Poor Targeting (Medium)
quirks.description: +1 to ranged attacks at medium range.

quirks.name: Poor Targeting (Short)
quirks.description: +1 to ranged attacks at short range.

quirks.name: Poor Workmanship
quirks.description: +1 to critical hit rolls. Roll of 13 is treated as 12 unless using Advanced Determining Critical Hits rules.

quirks.name: Prototype
quirks.description: +2 to critical hit rolls. Roll of 13 is treated as 12 unless using Advanced Determining Critical Hits rules.

quirks.name: Ramshackle
quirks.description: Mek has random negative quirks. roll 1d6, 1=Sensor Ghosts, 2=EM Interference, 3=Hard to Pilot, 4=Cooling system flaws, 5=Poor Performance, 6=No negative.

quirks.name: Sensor Ghosts
quirks.description: +1 TN to all ranged attacks.

quirks.name: Susceptible to Centurion Weapon System
quirks.description: Makes the unit susceptible to CWS, granting a greater range to CWS's targeting this unit.

quirks.name: Unbalanced
quirks.description: +1 to Piloting rolls due to terrain/planetary condition.

quirks.name: Un-streamlined
quirks.description: Unit cannot enter atmosphere without being destroyed.

quirks.name: Weak Head Armor (1)
quirks.description: Reduces head armor by the number of points shown.

quirks.name: Weak Head Armor (2)
quirks.description: Reduces head armor by the number of points shown.

quirks.name: Weak Head Armor (3)
quirks.description: Reduces head armor by the number of points shown.

quirks.name: Weak Head Armor (4)
quirks.description: Reduces head armor by the number of points shown.

quirks.name: Weak Head Armor (5)
quirks.description: Reduces head armor by the number of points shown.

quirks.name: Weak Legs
quirks.description: Potential critical damage when kicked or performing DFA. When mech is kicked, or does a DFA, roll for a possible crit on each leg, even if armor is not broken.

quirks.name: Weak Undercarriage
quirks.description: Aerospace unit takes 50 points of standard damage to nose, or rear for spheroids, if the Piloting roll for landing has a margin of failure 3 or greater.

quirks.name: No/Minimal Arms
quirks.description: This unit has no arms making certain tasks more difficult or impossible. +2 TN to standing up, no arm flipping, and no physical attacks with arms. Unit can still prop itself up to fire while prone.
